hooks.command: f=$(jq -r ".tool_input.file_path // empty" | tr "\\\\" "/"); case "$f" in */pdf_extractor/*.py|*/main.py) echo "{\"hookSpecificOutput\":{\"hookEventName\":\"PostToolUse\",\"additionalContext\":\"Doc-sync rule: edited $f (feature/config/CLI/exit-code source). If this changed behaviour, sync README.md, CLAUDE.md, and the GitHub wiki before finishing.\"}}";; esac
